tagline: Delivering financial clarity, compliance, and strategic advisory with integrity and precision.
description: Chartered Accountant offering expert services in taxation, audit, and financial advisory across India and worldwide.
bio: Chartered Accountant and member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) with over a decade of experience helping individuals, startups, and established businesses navigate taxation, compliance, and financial strategy. Specialized in direct and indirect taxation, statutory audits, GST advisory, corporate law, and NRI taxation. Committed to delivering accurate, timely, and client-focused financial solutions with the highest standards of professional ethics.

bullets: Running an independent chartered accountancy practice serving SMEs, NRIs, and high-net-worth individuals across Kerala and pan-India.
Providing comprehensive direct tax advisory, GST compliance, and business structuring services to a diverse client base.
Handling income tax assessments, appeals, and litigation support before tax authorities.
Advising NRI clients on FEMA compliance, repatriation, and cross-border tax planning.
experience.desc: Independent CA practice serving SMEs, NRIs and HNIs across India with expertise in taxation, GST, audit and financial advisory.

bullets: Led statutory and internal audit assignments for banking, manufacturing, and real estate clients.
Supervised a team of article clerks and managed client relationships end-to-end.
Conducted tax audits under Section 44AB and prepared detailed audit reports.
Assisted clients with GST registration, return filing, and reconciliation after GST rollout.
experience.desc: Led audit assignments for banking, manufacturing and real estate clients. Supervised article clerks and managed GST compliance post-rollout.

projects.title: Tax Planning & Advisory
projects.subtitle: Comprehensive Tax Solutions for Individuals & Businesses
projects.desc: End-to-end tax planning and advisory services covering income tax returns, GST filings, advance tax computation, TDS compliance, and tax-saving strategies for individuals, HUFs, and corporates.

projects.title: Audit & Assurance Services
projects.subtitle: Statutory, Internal & Tax Audits
projects.desc: Comprehensive audit and assurance services including statutory audits under Companies Act, tax audits under Income Tax Act, internal audits, and concurrent audits for banks and financial institutions.

publications.title: Understanding GST Input Tax Credit — Common Mistakes to Avoid
publications.desc: A practical guide covering the most common errors made by businesses while claiming GST Input Tax Credit, and how to avoid them to stay compliant and maximize savings.

publications.title: NRI Taxation in India — What You Need to Know
publications.desc: Comprehensive overview of tax obligations for Non-Resident Indians covering residential status, taxable income, DTAA benefits, and FEMA compliance requirements.

publications.title: Tax Saving Strategies for Small Business Owners
publications.desc: Practical tax planning strategies for SMEs and small business owners to legally minimize tax liability through proper structuring, deductions, and advance planning.

publications.title: Decoding the New ITR Forms — AY 2024-25
publications.desc: A clear breakdown of changes in Income Tax Return forms for Assessment Year 2024-25, helping taxpayers understand new disclosure requirements.
